faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Get answers to common questions about our services
faq.faq1Question: How do I open an account?
faq.faq1Answer: You can open an account online in just 10 minutes. Simply visit our application page, provide your information, and verify your identity. No visit to a branch is required.
faq.faq2Answer: Yes, all deposits are FDIC insured up to $250,000 per depositor, per insured bank, for each account ownership category.
faq.faq3Answer: We offer no monthly fees on checking accounts, no minimum balance requirements, and free ATM access at thousands of locations nationwide.
faq.faq4Question: How do I contact customer service?
faq.faq4Answer: Our customer service is available 24/7 by phone at 1-800-BYVAULTFN-1, through live chat on our website, or via the mobile app.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.subtitle: Please read these terms carefully before using our services

section1.title: 1. Introduction and Acceptance
section1.content1: Welcome to ByVault Finance. These Terms and Conditions ('Terms') constitute a legally binding agreement between you ('Customer,' 'you,' or 'your') and ByVault Finance ('Bank,' 'we,' 'us,' or 'our') governing your access to and use of our banking services, digital platforms, and financial products.
section1.content2: By opening an account, accessing our online banking platform, mobile application, or utilizing any of our financial services, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms, along with our Privacy Policy and any additional agreements applicable to specific products or services.

subsection1.title: 2.1 Eligibility Requirements:
subsection1.content: To open an account with ByVault Finance, you must:
subsection1.list1: Be at least 18 years of age or the age of majority in your jurisdiction
subsection1.list2: Possess legal capacity to enter into binding contracts
subsection1.list5: Have a valid Social Security Number or Tax Identification Number

subsection2.title: 2.2 Account Verification:
subsection2.content: We reserve the right to verify your identity and may request additional documentation at any time. This may include proof of address, employment verification, source of funds documentation, and other information required under applicable laws including the USA PATRIOT Act and Bank Secrecy Act.

subsection3.title: 2.3 Account Approval:
subsection3.content: ByVault Finance reserves the right to refuse account opening for any reason permitted by law, including but not limited to inability to verify identity, concerns about fraudulent activity, or failure to meet our account opening criteria.

subsection1.title: 3.1 Account Security:
subsection1.content: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials, including usernames, passwords, PINs, security questions, and any other authentication methods. You must immediately notify us of any unauthorized access or suspected security breach.

subsection2.title: 3.2 Authorized Transactions:
subsection2.content: You authorize us to honor all transactions initiated using your account credentials, whether by you or by third parties with your permission. You remain liable for all authorized and unauthorized transactions until you notify us of a security compromise.

subsection3.title: 3.3 Prohibited Activities:
subsection3.content: You agree not to use your account for:
subsection3.list4: Gambling transactions where prohibited by law
subsection3.list6: Business purposes if opened as a personal account

subsection4.title: 3.4 Account Monitoring:
subsection4.content: We actively monitor accounts for suspicious activity and reserve the right to freeze, suspend, or close accounts that violate these Terms or applicable laws.

subsection1.title: 4.1 Fee Schedule:
subsection1.content: All applicable fees are disclosed in our Fee Schedule, which is provided at account opening and is available on our website. Fees may include monthly maintenance fees, overdraft fees, ATM fees, wire transfer fees, and other service charges.

subsection2.title: 4.2 Fee Changes:
subsection2.content: We reserve the right to modify our fees with at least 30 days' prior written notice to you. Continued use of your account after the effective date constitutes acceptance of the new fee structure.

subsection3.title: 4.3 Interest Rates:
subsection3.content: Interest rates on deposit accounts are variable and may change at our discretion. Current rates are available on our website and in branch locations. Interest is calculated using the daily balance method and credited monthly.

subsection4.title: 4.4 Overdraft Protection:
subsection4.content: If you enroll in overdraft protection, transactions that exceed your available balance may be honored subject to our overdraft limit and applicable fees. You acknowledge that overdraft fees may result in additional charges.

subsection1.title: 5.1 Online and Mobile Banking:
subsection1.content: Our electronic banking services allow you to check balances, transfer funds, pay bills, deposit checks remotely, and perform other transactions. These services are subject to system availability and may be interrupted for maintenance.

subsection2.title: 5.2 Electronic Communications:
subsection2.content: By using our services, you consent to receive communications electronically, including account statements, notices, disclosures, and other information that we are legally required to provide.

subsection3.title: 5.3 Mobile Deposit:
subsection3.content: Our mobile deposit service allows you to deposit checks by capturing images. You agree to properly endorse checks, retain the original for 14 days, and securely destroy it thereafter. You are responsible for ensuring deposits are accurate and legitimate.

subsection4.title: 5.4 Bill Pay Services:
subsection4.content: Our bill pay service allows you to make payments to third parties. You authorize us to debit your account for payment amounts and any applicable fees. We are not responsible for late payments caused by payee processing delays.

subsection1.title: 6.1 Deposit Availability:
subsection1.content: Deposits are subject to verification and availability schedules as disclosed in our Funds Availability Policy. Electronic deposits are generally available within 1-2 business days, while check deposits may be held longer based on amount and account history.

subsection2.title: 6.2 Deposit Endorsements:
subsection2.content: All checks must be endorsed as specified by us. We reserve the right to reject improperly endorsed items or deposits that appear suspicious or fraudulent.

subsection3.title: 6.3 Withdrawal Limits:
subsection3.content: We may impose daily withdrawal and transfer limits for security purposes. ATM withdrawals and certain electronic transfers may be limited to protect your account.

subsection4.title: 6.4 Regulation D:
subsection4.content: For savings and money market accounts, federal regulations may limit certain types of withdrawals and transfers to six per monthly statement cycle.

subsection1.title: 7.1 Unauthorized Transactions:
subsection1.content: You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized transactions. Your liability for unauthorized electronic transfers is governed by federal law (Regulation E), which limits your losses if you report them promptly:
subsection1.list1: $0 if reported before any unauthorized use
subsection1.list2: Up to $50 if reported within 2 business days
subsection1.list3: Up to $500 if reported within 60 days of statement
subsection1.list4: Unlimited if not reported within 60 days

subsection2.title: 7.2 Error Resolution:
subsection2.content: If you believe an error has occurred, you must notify us within 60 days of the statement date. We will investigate and respond within 10 business days (or 45 days for certain transactions).

subsection3.title: 7.3 Limitation of Liability:
subsection3.content: To the maximum extent permitted by law, ByVault Finance is not liable for indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of our services, including lost profits or business interruption.

subsection4.title: 7.4 Arbitration Agreement:
subsection4.content: Any disputes arising from these Terms or your accounts shall be resolved through binding arbitration rather than court proceedings, except where prohibited by law. You waive your right to participate in class action lawsuits.

subsection1.title: 8.1 Closure by Customer:
subsection1.content: You may close your account at any time by providing written notice and returning all checks, debit cards, and other access devices. You remain responsible for all outstanding transactions and fees.

subsection2.title: 8.2 Closure by Bank:
subsection2.content: We reserve the right to close your account at any time for any reason, including but not limited to:

subsection3.title: 8.3 Final Distribution:
subsection3.content: Upon closure, any remaining balance will be mailed to your address of record after deducting applicable fees and charges. Unclaimed funds are subject to state escheatment laws.

subsection1.title: 9.1 Privacy Policy:
subsection1.content: Our collection, use, and protection of your personal information is governed by our Privacy Policy, which is incorporated into these Terms by reference. We comply with all applicable privacy laws including the Gramm-Leach-Bliley Act.

subsection2.title: 9.2 Information Sharing:
subsection2.content: We may share your information with affiliates, service providers, and third parties as necessary to provide services, comply with legal requirements, or prevent fraud.

subsection3.title: 9.3 Data Security:
subsection3.content: We employ industry-standard security measures including encryption, firewalls, and multi-factor authentication. However, no system is completely secure, and you acknowledge that electronic transmission carries inherent risks.

subsection1.title: 10.1 Governing Law:
subsection1.content: These Terms are governed by federal law and the laws of the state where your account was opened, without regard to conflict of law principles.

subsection2.title: 10.2 Regulatory Compliance:
subsection2.content: We comply with all applicable banking regulations including those issued by the Federal Reserve, FDIC, OCC, CFPB, and state banking authorities. Your accounts are FDIC insured up to the maximum amount permitted by law.

subsection3.title: 10.3 Anti-Money Laundering:
subsection3.content: We maintain compliance programs for the Bank Secrecy Act and USA PATRIOT Act. We may file Suspicious Activity Reports (SARs) and Currency Transaction Reports (CTRs) as required by law without notice to you.

subsection4.title: 10.4 Tax Reporting:
subsection4.content: We report account interest and other taxable events to the IRS as required. You are responsible for reporting and paying all applicable taxes on your accounts.

subsection1.title: 11.1 Right to Modify:
subsection1.content: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. Changes will be communicated through written notice, email, posting on our website, or statement inserts at least 30 days before the effective date.

subsection2.title: 11.2 Acceptance of Changes:
subsection2.content: Continued use of your account after the effective date of changes constitutes acceptance of the modified Terms. If you do not agree to the changes, you must close your account before the effective date.

subsection1.title: 12.1 Severability:
subsection1.content: If any provision of these Terms is found to be invalid or unenforceable, the remaining provisions shall continue in full force and effect.

subsection2.title: 12.2 Waiver:
subsection2.content: Our failure to enforce any provision does not constitute a waiver of our right to enforce that provision in the future.

subsection3.title: 12.3 Assignment:
subsection3.content: You may not assign these Terms or your account without our written consent. We may assign our rights and obligations without notice to you.

subsection4.title: 12.4 Entire Agreement:
subsection4.content: These Terms, together with our Privacy Policy, Fee Schedule, and product-specific disclosures, constitute the entire agreement between you and ByVault Finance regarding your accounts and supersede all prior agreements.

hero.title: Privacy Policy
hero.subtitle: Your privacy and security are our top priorities

introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.content1: ByVault Finance ("we," "us," "our," or "Bank") is committed to protecting your privacy and safeguarding your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, share, and protect your information when you use our banking services, website, mobile applications, and other digital platforms.
introduction.content2: This policy complies with the Gramm-Leach-Bliley Act (GLBA), the California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA), the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) where applicable, and other relevant privacy laws and regulations. By using our services, you consent to the practices described in this policy.

informationWeCollect.title: 1. Information We Collect
informationWeCollect.intro: We collect several types of information to provide and improve our services:

personalInfo.title: 1.1 Personal Identification Information:
items: Full name, date of birth, and Social Security Number or Tax ID

financialInfo.title: 1.2 Financial Information:
items: Account numbers, balances, and transaction history
Payment card information and banking credentials
Investment account information and portfolio data
Source of funds and wealth information

technicalInfo.title: 1.3 Technical and Usage Information:
items: IP address, device identifiers, and browser type
Cookies, web beacons, and similar tracking technologies
Website and mobile app usage patterns
Login times and account access patterns

communicationsInfo.title: 1.4 Communications and Interactions:
items: Customer service inquiries and support tickets
Phone call recordings for quality and training purposes

thirdPartyInfo.title: 1.5 Information from Third Parties:
thirdPartyInfo.content: We may receive information about you from credit bureaus, identity verification services, fraud prevention services, marketing partners, and other financial institutions.

howWeUse.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
howWeUse.intro: We use your information for the following purposes:

accountServices.title: 2.1 Account Services and Operations:
items: Providing customer service and technical support
Managing loan applications and credit decisions

legalCompliance.title: 2.2 Legal and Regulatory Compliance:
items: Verifying your identity and preventing identity theft
Reporting to regulatory authorities and law enforcement
Responding to legal process, subpoenas, and court orders
Filing Suspicious Activity Reports (SARs) and Currency Transaction Reports (CTRs)

security.title: 2.3 Security and Fraud Prevention:
items: Monitoring for fraudulent and suspicious activity
Protecting against unauthorized access and cyber threats

marketing.title: 2.4 Marketing and Communications:
items: Sending promotional offers and product information

businessOperations.title: 2.5 Business Operations:
businessOperations.content: We use aggregated and anonymized data to analyze trends, improve our services, develop new products, and enhance user experience.

informationSharing.title: 3. How We Share Your Information
informationSharing.intro: We may share your information in the following circumstances:

affiliates.title: 3.1 Affiliates and Subsidiaries:
affiliates.content: We may share information with our corporate affiliates and subsidiaries for business operations, marketing, and service provision. Our affiliates are bound by similar privacy protections.

serviceProviders.title: 3.2 Service Providers and Vendors:
serviceProviders.intro: We share information with third-party service providers who assist us with:
items: Data storage and cloud computing services
Customer service and call center operations

financialPartners.title: 3.3 Financial Partners:
items: Other financial institutions for transaction processing
Insurance providers for account protection products

legalRequirements.title: 3.4 Legal and Regulatory Requirements:
legalRequirements.intro: We disclose information when required by law, including:
items: Responding to subpoenas, court orders, and legal processes
Complying with regulatory examinations and audits

businessTransfers.title: 3.5 Business Transfers:
businessTransfers.content: In the event of a merger, acquisition, bankruptcy, or sale of assets, your information may be transferred to the acquiring entity.

consent.title: 3.6 With Your Consent:
consent.content: We may share information with third parties when you explicitly authorize us to do so, such as when linking external accounts or using third-party financial management tools.

access.title: 4.1 Access and Correction:
access.content: You have the right to access your personal information and request corrections to inaccurate data. You can update most information through your online account or by contacting customer service.

marketingOptOut.title: 4.2 Marketing Opt-Out:
marketingOptOut.intro: You can opt out of marketing communications by:
items: Adjusting preferences in your account settings
Sending a written request to our mailing address

doNotShare.title: 4.3 Do Not Share:
doNotShare.content: You can limit our sharing of information with affiliates for marketing purposes by opting out through your account settings or contacting us directly.

ccpaRights.title: 4.4 California Privacy Rights (CCPA):
ccpaRights.intro: California residents have additional rights including:
items: Right to know what personal information is collected
Right to know if information is sold or shared
Right to opt out of the sale of personal information
Right to request deletion of personal information
Right to non-discrimination for exercising privacy rights

gdprRights.title: 4.5 European Privacy Rights (GDPR):
gdprRights.intro: If you are in the European Economic Area, you have rights including:
items: Right to access your personal data
Right to rectification of inaccurate data
Right to erasure ("right to be forgotten")

exerciseRights.content: To exercise these rights, please contact our Privacy Office using the information provided at the end of this policy.

measures.title: 5.1 Security Measures:
measures.intro: We implement comprehensive security measures to protect your information:
items: AES-256 encryption for data at rest
Regular security audits and vulnerability assessments
Employee security training and access controls

physicalSecurity.title: 5.2 Physical Security:
physicalSecurity.content: Our data centers employ physical security controls including surveillance, access badges, biometric scanners, and 24/7 monitoring.

breachNotification.title: 5.3 Breach Notification:
breachNotification.content: In the event of a data breach that compromises your personal information, we will notify you and relevant authorities as required by law, typically within 72 hours of discovery.

yourResponsibilities.title: 5.4 Your Responsibilities:
yourResponsibilities.content: You must protect your account credentials, use strong passwords, enable MFA, avoid public Wi-Fi for banking, keep your devices secure, and report suspicious activity immediately.

types.title: 6.1 Types of Cookies:
types.intro: We use various types of cookies:

items.description: Required for website functionality and security
Help us understand how visitors use our site
Track your browsing to provide relevant advertisements

management.title: 6.2 Cookie Management:
management.content: You can control cookies through your browser settings. Note that disabling certain cookies may limit website functionality.

thirdParty.title: 6.3 Third-Party Analytics:
thirdParty.content: We use services like Google Analytics to analyze website traffic. These services may collect information about your visits to our site and other websites.

retentionPeriods.title: 7.1 Retention Periods:
retentionPeriods.intro: We retain your information for as long as necessary to:
items: Maintain your accounts and provide services
Comply with legal and regulatory requirements

specificRequirements.title: 7.2 Specific Retention Requirements:
specificRequirements.intro: We are required to retain certain records for specific periods:
items: Account records: 7 years after account closure
Identity verification documents: 5 years after relationship ends
Loan documents: 7 years after final payment

secureDisposal.title: 7.3 Secure Disposal:
secureDisposal.content: When information is no longer needed, we securely destroy it using methods appropriate to the sensitivity of the data.

childrenPrivacy.title: 8. Children's Privacy
childrenPrivacy.content1: Our services are not directed to individuals under 18 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children without parental consent. Custodial accounts for minors require parental or guardian authorization.
childrenPrivacy.content2: If we discover that we have inadvertently collected information from a child under 13 without proper consent, we will delete that information immediately.

internationalTransfers.title: 9. International Data Transfers
internationalTransfers.intro: Your information may be transferred to and processed in countries other than your country of residence. We ensure that international transfers comply with applicable laws and implement appropriate safeguards such as:
items: Standard Contractual Clauses approved by the European Commission

changesToPolicy.title: 10. Changes to This Privacy Policy
changesToPolicy.intro: We may update this Privacy Policy periodically to reflect changes in our practices, technology, legal requirements, or business operations. Material changes will be communicated through:
items: Email notification to your registered email address
changesToPolicy.content: Continued use of our services after changes become effective constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

contact.title: Privacy Office Contact
contact.intro: For privacy-related inquiries, to exercise your rights, or to file a complaint:
contact.note: We will respond to your request within 30 days. For California residents exercising CCPA rights, we will respond within 45 days.

fdic.title: FDIC Insured
fdic.description: Your deposits are insured up to $250,000 per depositor.

security.title: Bank-Level Security
security.description: 256-bit encryption and multi-factor authentication protect your data.

control.title: Your Control
control.description: Manage your privacy preferences anytime in account settings.

hero.title: Your Security is Our Priority
hero.subtitle: Bank-level security protecting your accounts with 256-bit encryption, real-time fraud monitoring, and FDIC insurance up to $250,000

securityFeatures.title: Advanced Security Features
securityFeatures.subtitle: Explore our full range of banking products and services

features.title: 256-Bit Encryption
features.description: Military-grade SSL/TLS encryption protects all your data in transit and at rest

features.title: Multi-Factor Authentication
features.description: Multiple verification layers ensure only you can access your account

features.title: 24/7 Fraud Monitoring
features.description: AI-powered systems detect and prevent suspicious activity around the clock

features.title: Secure Infrastructure
features.description: Enterprise-grade servers with redundant backups in multiple locations

privacyRights.title: Your Privacy Rights
privacyRights.subtitle: Transparent policies that comply with federal privacy laws and give you control over your data

policies.title: Data Collection & Usage
policies.description: We collect only what's necessary to provide our services
points: Personal information for account verification (name, address, SSN)
Transaction data to process payments and prevent fraud
Device information for security and authentication
Communication preferences for alerts and updates
No sale of personal information to third parties

policies.title: Information Sharing
policies.description: Your data is shared only when legally required or explicitly authorized
points: Service providers (payment processors, identity verification)
Regulatory authorities when required by law
Credit bureaus for credit reporting purposes
Your explicit consent required for marketing partners
Annual privacy notice detailing all sharing practices

policies.title: Your Privacy Rights
policies.description: Federal and state laws protect your financial privacy
points: Access your personal data at any time
Request corrections to inaccurate information
Opt-out of marketing communications
Delete your data (subject to legal requirements)
Export your data in portable format
File complaints with regulatory authorities

securityTips.title: Security Best Practices
securityTips.subtitle: Follow these essential tips to protect your account and personal information

tips.title: Create Strong Passwords
tips.description: Use 12+ characters with uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and symbols. Never reuse passwords across accounts.

tips.title: Enable Two-Factor Authentication
tips.description: Add an extra security layer by requiring a second verification step beyond your password.

tips.title: Monitor Account Activity
tips.description: Review transactions weekly and set up alerts for unusual activity. Report suspicious charges immediately.

tips.title: Beware of Phishing Scams
tips.description: Never click suspicious links or share account details via email, text, or phone. Verify requests directly with the bank.

tips.title: Use Secure Networks
tips.description: Avoid banking on public Wi-Fi. Use your mobile data or a VPN when accessing accounts outside your home.

tips.title: Keep Software Updated
tips.description: Regularly update your devices, browsers, and banking apps to get the latest security patches.

commonScams.title: Recognize & Avoid Common Scams
commonScams.subtitle: Stay alert to these common fraud tactics and protect yourself from scammers

scams.description: Fake emails claiming to be from your bank asking for account details or password resets
scams.warning: Banks never ask for passwords via email

scams.description: Callers impersonating bank staff requesting verification of account information or one-time codes
scams.warning: Never share security codes over the phone

scams.description: Text messages with urgent warnings about account problems with links to fake websites
scams.warning: Don't click links in unexpected text messages

scams.description: Scammers posing as tech support claiming your account has been compromised
scams.warning: Contact us through official channels only

scams.description: Counterfeit checks or requests to deposit checks and wire back funds
Online relationships leading to requests for money transfers or account access
scams.warning: Never send money to people you haven't met

cta.title: Questions About Security?
cta.subtitle: Our security team is available 24/7 to assist with any concerns, fraud reports, or security questions

hero.title: Terms & Conditions
hero.subtitle: Please read these terms carefully before using our services

introduction.title: 1. Introduction and Acceptance
introduction.content1: Welcome to ByVault Finance. These Terms and Conditions ('Terms') constitute a legally binding agreement between you ('Customer,' 'you,' or 'your') and ByVault Finance ('Bank,' 'we,' 'us,' or 'our') governing your access to and use of our banking services, digital platforms, and financial products.
introduction.content2: By opening an account, accessing our online banking platform, mobile application, or utilizing any of our financial services, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms, along with our Privacy Policy and any additional agreements applicable to specific products or services.

eligibility.title: 2.1 Eligibility Requirements:
eligibility.content: To open an account with ByVault Finance, you must:
items: Be at least 18 years of age or the age of majority in your jurisdiction
Possess legal capacity to enter into binding contracts
Have a valid Social Security Number or Tax Identification Number

verification.title: 2.2 Account Verification:
verification.content: We reserve the right to verify your identity and may request additional documentation at any time. This may include proof of address, employment verification, source of funds documentation, and other information required under applicable laws including the USA PATRIOT Act and Bank Secrecy Act.

approval.title: 2.3 Account Approval:
approval.content: ByVault Finance reserves the right to refuse account opening for any reason permitted by law, including but not limited to inability to verify identity, concerns about fraudulent activity, or failure to meet our account opening criteria.

security.title: 3.1 Account Security:
security.content: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials, including usernames, passwords, PINs, security questions, and any other authentication methods. You must immediately notify us of any unauthorized access or suspected security breach.

authorized.title: 3.2 Authorized Transactions:
authorized.content: You authorize us to honor all transactions initiated using your account credentials, whether by you or by third parties with your permission. You remain liable for all authorized and unauthorized transactions until you notify us of a security compromise.

prohibited.title: 3.3 Prohibited Activities:
prohibited.content: You agree not to use your account for:
items: Gambling transactions where prohibited by law
Business purposes if opened as a personal account

monitoring.title: 3.4 Account Monitoring:
monitoring.content: We actively monitor accounts for suspicious activity and reserve the right to freeze, suspend, or close accounts that violate these Terms or applicable laws.

schedule.title: 4.1 Fee Schedule:
schedule.content: All applicable fees are disclosed in our Fee Schedule, which is provided at account opening and is available on our website. Fees may include monthly maintenance fees, overdraft fees, ATM fees, wire transfer fees, and other service charges.

changes.title: 4.2 Fee Changes:
changes.content: We reserve the right to modify our fees with at least 30 days' prior written notice to you. Continued use of your account after the effective date constitutes acceptance of the new fee structure.

interest.title: 4.3 Interest Rates:
interest.content: Interest rates on deposit accounts are variable and may change at our discretion. Current rates are available on our website and in branch locations. Interest is calculated using the daily balance method and credited monthly.

overdraft.title: 4.4 Overdraft Protection:
overdraft.content: If you enroll in overdraft protection, transactions that exceed your available balance may be honored subject to our overdraft limit and applicable fees. You acknowledge that overdraft fees may result in additional charges.

online.title: 5.1 Online and Mobile Banking:
online.content: Our electronic banking services allow you to check balances, transfer funds, pay bills, deposit checks remotely, and perform other transactions. These services are subject to system availability and may be interrupted for maintenance.

communications.title: 5.2 Electronic Communications:
communications.content: By using our services, you consent to receive communications electronically, including account statements, notices, disclosures, and other information that we are legally required to provide.

mobileDeposit.title: 5.3 Mobile Deposit:
mobileDeposit.content: Our mobile deposit service allows you to deposit checks by capturing images. You agree to properly endorse checks, retain the original for 14 days, and securely destroy it thereafter. You are responsible for ensuring deposits are accurate and legitimate.

billPay.title: 5.4 Bill Pay Services:
billPay.content: Our bill pay service allows you to make payments to third parties. You authorize us to debit your account for payment amounts and any applicable fees. We are not responsible for late payments caused by payee processing delays.

availability.title: 6.1 Deposit Availability:
availability.content: Deposits are subject to verification and availability schedules as disclosed in our Funds Availability Policy. Electronic deposits are generally available within 1-2 business days, while check deposits may be held longer based on amount and account history.

endorsements.title: 6.2 Deposit Endorsements:
endorsements.content: All checks must be endorsed as specified by us. We reserve the right to reject improperly endorsed items or deposits that appear suspicious or fraudulent.

limits.title: 6.3 Withdrawal Limits:
limits.content: We may impose daily withdrawal and transfer limits for security purposes. ATM withdrawals and certain electronic transfers may be limited to protect your account.

regulationD.title: 6.4 Regulation D:
regulationD.content: For savings and money market accounts, federal regulations may limit certain types of withdrawals and transfers to six per monthly statement cycle.

unauthorized.title: 7.1 Unauthorized Transactions:
unauthorized.content: You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized transactions. Your liability for unauthorized electronic transfers is governed by federal law (Regulation E), which limits your losses if you report them promptly:
items: $0 if reported before any unauthorized use
Up to $50 if reported within 2 business days
Up to $500 if reported within 60 days of statement
Unlimited if not reported within 60 days

errorResolution.title: 7.2 Error Resolution:
errorResolution.content: If you believe an error has occurred, you must notify us within 60 days of the statement date. We will investigate and respond within 10 business days (or 45 days for certain transactions).

limitation.title: 7.3 Limitation of Liability:
limitation.content: To the maximum extent permitted by law, ByVault Finance is not liable for indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of our services, including lost profits or business interruption.

arbitration.title: 7.4 Arbitration Agreement:
arbitration.content: Any disputes arising from these Terms or your accounts shall be resolved through binding arbitration rather than court proceedings, except where prohibited by law. You waive your right to participate in class action lawsuits.

customer.title: 8.1 Closure by Customer:
customer.content: You may close your account at any time by providing written notice and returning all checks, debit cards, and other access devices. You remain responsible for all outstanding transactions and fees.

bank.title: 8.2 Closure by Bank:
bank.content: We reserve the right to close your account at any time for any reason, including but not limited to:

final.title: 8.3 Final Distribution:
final.content: Upon closure, any remaining balance will be mailed to your address of record after deducting applicable fees and charges. Unclaimed funds are subject to state escheatment laws.

policy.title: 9.1 Privacy Policy:
policy.content: Our collection, use, and protection of your personal information is governed by our Privacy Policy, which is incorporated into these Terms by reference. We comply with all applicable privacy laws including the Gramm-Leach-Bliley Act.

sharing.title: 9.2 Information Sharing:
sharing.content: We may share your information with affiliates, service providers, and third parties as necessary to provide services, comply with legal requirements, or prevent fraud.

security.title: 9.3 Data Security:
security.content: We employ industry-standard security measures including encryption, firewalls, and multi-factor authentication. However, no system is completely secure, and you acknowledge that electronic transmission carries inherent risks.

governing.title: 10.1 Governing Law:
governing.content: These Terms are governed by federal law and the laws of the state where your account was opened, without regard to conflict of law principles.

regulatory.title: 10.2 Regulatory Compliance:
regulatory.content: We comply with all applicable banking regulations including those issued by the Federal Reserve, FDIC, OCC, CFPB, and state banking authorities. Your accounts are FDIC insured up to the maximum amount permitted by law.

aml.title: 10.3 Anti-Money Laundering:
aml.content: We maintain compliance programs for the Bank Secrecy Act and USA PATRIOT Act. We may file Suspicious Activity Reports (SARs) and Currency Transaction Reports (CTRs) as required by law without notice to you.

tax.title: 10.4 Tax Reporting:
tax.content: We report account interest and other taxable events to the IRS as required. You are responsible for reporting and paying all applicable taxes on your accounts.

modify.title: 11.1 Right to Modify:
modify.content: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. Changes will be communicated through written notice, email, posting on our website, or statement inserts at least 30 days before the effective date.

acceptance.title: 11.2 Acceptance of Changes:
acceptance.content: Continued use of your account after the effective date of changes constitutes acceptance of the modified Terms. If you do not agree to the changes, you must close your account before the effective date.

severability.title: 12.1 Severability:
severability.content: If any provision of these Terms is found to be invalid or unenforceable, the remaining provisions shall continue in full force and effect.

waiver.title: 12.2 Waiver:
waiver.content: Our failure to enforce any provision does not constitute a waiver of our right to enforce that provision in the future.

assignment.title: 12.3 Assignment:
assignment.content: You may not assign these Terms or your account without our written consent. We may assign our rights and obligations without notice to you.

entireAgreement.title: 12.4 Entire Agreement:
entireAgreement.content: These Terms, together with our Privacy Policy, Fee Schedule, and product-specific disclosures, constitute the entire agreement between you and ByVault Finance regarding your accounts and supersede all prior agreements.

contact.title: Questions About These Terms?
contact.subtitle: If you have any questions regarding these Terms and Conditions, please contact us:

unauthorized.title: Access Denied
unauthorized.message: You don't have permission to access this page. Please contact the administrator if you believe this is an error.

transactionPin.title: Transaction PIN
transactionPin.description: Secure your transactions with a PIN

whatIs.title: What is a Transaction PIN?
whatIs.description: Your Transaction PIN is a 4-digit security code used to authorize financial transactions. This adds an extra layer of protection to prevent unauthorized access to your funds.

securityAlert.title: Security Alert
securityAlert.message: Keep your transaction PIN confidential. Never share it with anyone, including bank staff. We will never ask for your PIN via email, phone, or text message.

modal.title: Change Transaction PIN
modal.newPinHelp: Create a secure PIN you can remember

success.title: PIN Updated!
success.message: Your transaction PIN has been successfully changed

errors.pinLength: Transaction PIN must be exactly 4 digits

twoFactor.title: Email-Based Two-Factor Authentication
twoFactor.description: Add an extra layer of security to your account

status.title: Current Status
status.enabledMessage: When enabled, a 6-digit verification code will be sent to your email address {email} each time you log in to your account.

howItWorks.title: How Two-Factor Authentication Works
items: When you log in with your password, a 6-digit code will be sent to your email
You must enter this code to complete your login
This adds an extra layer of security to your account
The code expires after 10 minutes for security

securityTips.title: Security Tips
tips: Log out when using shared devices
